Title: Simply Play MIDI
Description: The easiest way to play MIDI music in Unity. No scripting is required, everything is configured in the Inspector.
Script: Use only MPTK prefabs. Just drag, play – no scripting required

Title: Play MIDI with Scripts and Explore Features
Description: Learn how to integrate MPTK into your app with C# scripts. Use the MPTK API with just a few lines of code to access each available feature.

Title: Multi MIDI Player
Description: Four MidiFilePlayer prefabs are set up in a 3D scene, each demonstrating simple spatialization as the camera moves, without any spatializer plugin.
Script: Use only MPTK prefabs. Just drag, play – no scripting required

Title: MIDI File Loading
Description: Load all or part of MIDI events from the MIDI database or from disk in the Pro version. This demo does not include sequencing, synthesis, or playback and focuses on decoding MIDI files into user-friendly MPTKEvent objects.

Title: MIDI Stream Music
Description: Generate notes in real time without MIDI files using only a few lines of code. The Pro version also lets you play chords and ranges, and apply real-time synth parameter changes such as attack and effects.

Title: Catch Music
Description: Notes are read from a MidiFilePlayer and fall onto a conveyor belt. At the end, they are played by a MidiStreamPlayer. Some monsters disturb the music, making this demo a potential game concept.

Title: MIDI Spatialization
Description: A moving sphere plays MIDI music to demonstrate spatialization. For best results, use an external spatializer plugin or, in Pro, enable Orientation and Distance in the Inspector.
Script: Use only MPTK prefabs. Just drag, play – no scripting required

Title: MIDI Playlist
Description: Play a list of MIDI files or selected file segments with time overlap.
Script: Use only MPTK prefabs. Just drag, play – no scripting required

Title: Euclidean Rhythm
Description: An original algorithm for generating rhythms. Users can interactively change synth parameters and apply real-time events for a precise music generator.

Title: MIDI File Writer
Description: A collection of short examples for creating, writing, and directly playing MIDI files with the easy-to-use MPTKWriter API. This class also forms the foundation of the MIDI Editor.

Title: Play External MIDI
Description: Select MIDI files from local storage or from a website and play them. Try the amazing MIDI roulette.

Title: Channel and Track Spatialization
Description: Each sphere is linked to a dedicated MIDI synth by channel or track, with its own AudioSource and real-time 3D position. Fly between instruments and locate each one in 3D space. For best results, enable Orientation and Distance in the Inspector.

Title: Read MIDI Keyboard and Play Notes with MidiStreamPlayer
Description: Demo of the MidiInReader prefab, which reads MIDI events from a connected keyboard. In this demo, keyboard events are played by the MPTK MIDI synth. A plugin available on the website is required.

Title: Read and Write MIDI Keyboard Events
Description: Read and send MIDI events to a connected MIDI keyboard. A plugin available on the website is required.

Title: Merge MIDI Files
Description: Load MIDI files from the MIDI database, merge or insert them at a chosen position, and save them as external MIDI files or back to the MIDI database. All these actions can be performed during playback.

Title: Inner Loop
Description: A quick demonstration of the MIDI inner loop feature, a highly accurate MIDI looper.

Title: Load External SoundFont
Description: Load a SoundFont from a website or local storage. Ideal for reducing app size or offering instrument and style options.

Title: Technical Demo
Description: Useful for displaying logs and stats when testing Oboe or WebGL. Oboe is a low-latency audio library that uses OpenSL and AAudio to process audio on Android.

Title: Music Wood Box
Description: Turn your smartphone or tablet into a wooden instrument. This demo is still under development and not yet available. Enjoy the expressive touch surface with low-latency playback.
